markdown:
#  Export a Commitments List 
##  Background 
You can export a list of [commitments](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) using the options in the Export menu.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool  
OR
    * 'Read Only' or 'Standard' level permissions on the Commitments tool and you MUST be a designated member of the 'Privacy' drop-down list on the commitment.
  * **Supported File Formats:**
    * Comma Separated Values (CSV)
    * Portable Document File (PDF)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * To export a single purchase order or subcontract, see [Export a Commitment](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/export-a-commitment).


##  Prerequisites 
  * Create a Commitment


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Commitments** tool.
  2. Click the **Contracts** tab. 
#####  Note
When you first open the Commitments tool, your system's focus is placed on this tab by default.
  3. Click the **Export** button and choose one (1) of these options: 
#####  Note
This action exports any purchase orders or subcontracts in the list. To narrow the number of items showing in the list, see [Search for and Apply Filters to the Commitments Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/search-for-and-apply-filters-to-the-commitments-tool).
  
![Export Commitments](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4f6e9b18bf59900b070319b2a5e3ef64/41bcc46e48034385c713426eb2e67ec3/export-commitments.png?fm=webp)
     * **CSV**. Downloads a CSV copy of all the purchase orders and subcontracts in the list to your web browser's download location.
     * **PDF**. Generates a PDF copy of all the purchase orders and subcontracts in the list and opens the exported file in a new browser window.


## See Also
  * [Export a Commitment](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/export-a-commitment)
  * [About the Commitments Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/about-the-commitments-tool)
  * [Create Purchase Orders](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/create-purchase-orders)
title: Export a Commitments List
description: To export a list of purchase orders or subcontracts to the CSV or PDF file format using the Export drop-down in the Project level Commitments tool.
